seoTitle: Wellington vs Wellington East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellington and Wellington East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wellington vs Wellington East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellington and Wellington East.
heading: Wellington vs Wellington East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellington, South Australia and Wellington East, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellington East has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Wellington (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellington or Wellington East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellington has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Wellington East scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellington scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Wellington East scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellington or Wellington East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellington East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
